name: ApprovalQueue
description: A task approval queue with pending items, approve/reject actions, and status filters. Ideal for review workflows, content moderation, and agent task approval.

visual.description: Header with queue count and filter tabs (Pending/Approved/Rejected/All). Each queue item is a card showing title, requester, timestamp, priority badge, and approve/reject buttons.
visual.layout: header + filter tabs + scrollable item list

props.name: items
props.description: Array of approval items with id, title, requester, description, priority, status, createdAt
